title: pelargonium × serratifolium
intro: Pelargonium × serratifolium, also known as the copper tip rose or serrated leafed geranium, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the geranium family. Traditionally, the leaves and flowers of this plant have been used in herbal medicine due to their antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which make it effective in treating a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium × serratifolium include relief from sore throats, coughs, and colds, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems and reduce stress levels. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of this plant are often made into teas, tinctures, or infused oils to harness its medicinal properties.
